$comment: Single source of truth for active experiments. Each entry under `experiments` must have: owner (string), hypothesis (string), start_date (ISO date), decision_date (ISO date), primary_metric (string, e.g. 'affiliate_link_click'), files (array of paths that read the flag). Auto-audited by scripts/audit-feature-flags.mjs which cross-references PostHog flags against this registry and the codebase to flag drift (registered-but-unused, used-but-unregistered, past decision_date).

site-modern-v1.hypothesis: A unified modern redesign across all 6 primary pages (one shared assignment, so a user is modern everywhere or control everywhere) holds or lifts site-wide affiliate_link_click vs the current design. Replaces the 6 per-page experiments (reviews/home/guide/research/compare/never-hungover-modern-v1) to give consistent UX and faster significance.
